imageAlt: Contact opening balances roadmap item preview image
title: Contact opening balances
summaryBody: When established businesses set up on FA, they currently have all outstanding payments allocated in a lump to trade creditors or trade debtors. This makes it difficult to know who they owe / owes them and allocating those payments when they happen. By attributing opening balances to named contacts, businesses will have a clearer and cleaner way to transition to FA for their bookkeeping.
detailBody: When established businesses set up on FA, they currently have all outstanding payments allocated in a lump to trade creditors or trade debtors. This makes it difficult to know who they owe / owes them and allocating those payments when they happen. By attributing opening balances to named contacts, businesses will have a clearer and cleaner way to transition to FA for their bookkeeping.
